description: Beautiful 3 bedroom, 3 bathroom end unit townhome in Murrayville Glen!  This home boasts a bright & open living room w/ feature gas fireplace, dining area w/ sliding door access to quiet yard & spacious patio. Kitchen w/ plenty of cabinet & counter space, breakfast bar, stainless appliances, adjacent family/flex room, & powder room. Upper floor features 3 bedrooms including large primary suite w/ W/I closet & 4 pc ensuite, & 4 pc main bathroom. Updates include paint, flooring, light fixtures, toilets, fridge, & HWT! Garage & parking pad, plus street parking options! Gated complex offers a superb clubhouse & exercise room. Steps to Denny Ross Park, & an easy walk to Murrayville amenities including schools, shopping, restaurants, cafes, parks, library, & W.C. Blair Rec Centre w/pool.
